name: Spec Kit Interop
summary: Imports Spec Kit-style intent artifacts into Delano-governed delivery projects.

commands.name: delano import-spec-kit
commands.description: Create a planned Delano project from a supported Spec Kit-style markdown artifact.
output: JSON result with ok, command, project, source, validation

commands.name: delano research
commands.description: Open repo-native research intake for unclear imported intent.
output: JSON result with ok, command, project, research, files, validation

generated_files.fold_forward: spec, plan, decisions, workstreams, tasks, or updates

validation: npm run check:text-safety for Delano repo changes

install.conflict_policy: Use existing Delano install allowlist behavior; abort on generated project collisions unless an operator approves a diff-backed change.

limits: Does not execute imported tasks automatically.
Does not write Linear or GitHub state directly.
Does not depend on Obsidian, OpenClaw, or private local paths.
